title: cyperus stramineoferrugineus
intro: Cyperus stramineoferrugineus, also known as straw-colored cyperus, is a species of sedge found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyperus stramineoferrugineus include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic and to aid in digestion. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties and to promote overall well-being.
